productDisplayName: Jockey CSM Men Comfort Stretch Grey Trunks CS04
description: Composition Grey trunk briefs made of combed cotton and elastane, with a double-layered front pouch, trunk shape leg and soft waistband with branding Fit Mid rise Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade Crafted from a perfect blend of premium combed cotton and elastane, these trunks from jockey are designed with trendy and smart square-cut fit. The double-layered contoured front pouch gives maximum comfort and support, while the new ultra soft waistband provides a super soft, smooth and comfortable grip. Jockey has developed a unique leg treatment which gives freedom of movement and prevents the fabric from 'riding up' so you can avoid discomfort all day long.
